skipped: Delete user buttons were skipped by default policy.

findings.title: Users page search throws client error
findings.action: Type into the user search input
findings.symptom: The page crashes after the first keypress.
findings.evidence: Browser console shows a TypeError in the users page state update path.
findings.repro: Log in as admin, open Users, type one character into the search input.
findings.fixIntent: Guard the search-state normalization path so undefined collection data cannot be filtered before load completes.
findings.verification: Repeat the admin Users search flow and confirm the table filters without a console error.
